name: OXFORD INDUSTRIES INC
business: We are a leading branded apparel company that designs, sources, markets and distributes products bearing the trademarks of our portfolio of lifestyle brands: Tommy Bahama, Lilly Pulitzer, Johnny Was, Southern Tide, TBBC, Duck Head and Jack Rogers.
sellsTo: direct to consumer customers through full-price retail stores, e-commerce websites, outlets, and food and beverage operations
wholesale customers including better department stores, specialty stores, multi-branded e-commerce retailers, and off-price retailers

exposures.sentence: We are a leading branded apparel company that designs, sources, markets and distributes products bearing the trademarks of our portfolio of lifestyle brands: Tommy Bahama, Lilly Pulitzer, Johnny Was, Southern Tide, TBBC, Duck Head and Jack Rogers.

During Fiscal 2025, 82% of our consolidated net sales were through our direct to consumer channels of distribution, which consist of our brand specific full-price retail stores, e-commerce websites and outlets, as well as our Tommy Bahama food and beverage operations.
we completed the building of the new distribution center in Lyons, Georgia in the First Quarter of Fiscal 2026

we continue to invest in and leverage technology to serve consumers when, where, and how they choose to shop, including artificial intelligence-enabled capabilities that support more personalized marketing, improved inventory and demand planning, and a more seamless, cross-channel shopping experience.

catalysts.event: Completion of new distribution center in Lyons, Georgia
catalysts.sentence: we completed the building of the new distribution center in Lyons, Georgia in the First Quarter of Fiscal 2026

catalysts.event: Targeted opening of three new full-price retail locations and one outlet store for Tommy Bahama in Fiscal 2026
catalysts.sentence: In Fiscal 2026, we are targeting three new full-price retail locations and one outlet store location.

catalysts.event: Expected opening of at least four new full-price retail stores for Lilly Pulitzer in Fiscal 2026
catalysts.sentence: Currently, we expect to open at least four new full-price retail stores in Fiscal 2026
